name: Apple Cranberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the egg, milk, applesauce, and melted butter until well combined.
3. Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened. The batter will be lumpy.
4. Gently fold in the cranberries that have been tossed with 1/2 cup of flour.
5. Divide the batter evenly among 12 greased muffin cups.
6. In a small bowl, combine the sugar and cinnamon for topping.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
